scripts.dev: (npx supabase stop || true) && AI_PROVIDER=mock AI_MODEL=mock/runtime-default npx supabase start && npm run seed:storage && npm -w web run dev
scripts.test:integration: (npx supabase stop || true) && AI_PROVIDER=mock AI_MODEL=mock/runtime-default npx supabase start && npm run seed:storage && vitest run tests/api/integration
scripts.test:e2e: (npx supabase stop || true) && AI_PROVIDER=mock AI_MODEL=mock/runtime-default npx supabase start && npm run seed:storage && vitest run tests/api/e2e
scripts.test:integration:live:free: : "${AI_MODEL_FREE:?AI_MODEL_FREE is required}" "${OPENROUTER_API_KEY:?OPENROUTER_API_KEY is required}" && (npx supabase stop || true) && AI_PROVIDER=openrouter AI_MODEL="$AI_MODEL_FREE" OPENROUTER_API_KEY="$OPENROUTER_API_KEY" npx supabase start && npm run seed:storage && AI_LIVE=1 AI_LIVE_LABEL=free AI_PROVIDER=openrouter AI_MODEL="$AI_MODEL_FREE" OPENROUTER_API_KEY="$OPENROUTER_API_KEY" vitest run tests/api/integration/live-ai
scripts.test:integration:live:paid: : "${AI_MODEL_PAID:?AI_MODEL_PAID is required}" "${OPENROUTER_API_KEY:?OPENROUTER_API_KEY is required}" && (npx supabase stop || true) && AI_PROVIDER=openrouter AI_MODEL="$AI_MODEL_PAID" OPENROUTER_API_KEY="$OPENROUTER_API_KEY" npx supabase start && npm run seed:storage && AI_LIVE=1 AI_LIVE_LABEL=paid AI_PROVIDER=openrouter AI_MODEL="$AI_MODEL_PAID" OPENROUTER_API_KEY="$OPENROUTER_API_KEY" vitest run tests/api/integration/live-ai
scripts.test:e2e:live:free: : "${AI_MODEL_FREE:?AI_MODEL_FREE is required}" "${OPENROUTER_API_KEY:?OPENROUTER_API_KEY is required}" && (npx supabase stop || true) && AI_PROVIDER=openrouter AI_MODEL="$AI_MODEL_FREE" OPENROUTER_API_KEY="$OPENROUTER_API_KEY" npx supabase start && npm run seed:storage && AI_LIVE=1 AI_LIVE_LABEL=free AI_PROVIDER=openrouter AI_MODEL="$AI_MODEL_FREE" OPENROUTER_API_KEY="$OPENROUTER_API_KEY" vitest run tests/api/e2e/live-ai-flow.test.ts
scripts.test:e2e:live:paid: : "${AI_MODEL_PAID:?AI_MODEL_PAID is required}" "${OPENROUTER_API_KEY:?OPENROUTER_API_KEY is required}" && (npx supabase stop || true) && AI_PROVIDER=openrouter AI_MODEL="$AI_MODEL_PAID" OPENROUTER_API_KEY="$OPENROUTER_API_KEY" npx supabase start && npm run seed:storage && AI_LIVE=1 AI_LIVE_LABEL=paid AI_PROVIDER=openrouter AI_MODEL="$AI_MODEL_PAID" OPENROUTER_API_KEY="$OPENROUTER_API_KEY" vitest run tests/api/e2e/live-ai-flow.test.ts
scripts.test:live: npm run test:integration:live:free && npm run test:integration:live:paid && npm run test:e2e:live:free && npm run test:e2e:live:paid
scripts.test:all: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm -w web run check && npm run test:unit && npm run test:integration && npm run test:e2e && npm -w web run test:e2e
